title: Excalibur | Realm RPG: Treasure Balloons Support
description: Reimagined familiar riches, carried by the wind
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/3agazQH.png)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Realm RPG: Treasure Balloons](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-treasure-balloons) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**

*   Replaces all balloon chest textures with those from Excalibur.
*   Adds variants such as trapped chests and all copper chest variants.

**Credits:**

*     Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
*     nocubeyt – Creator of _Realm RPG: Treasure Balloons_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-realm-rpg-treasure-balloons)
